# Izhar Foster (Pvt) Limited

> Izhar Foster (Pvt) Limited is the cold-chain division of Izhar Engineering, headquartered in Lahore, Pakistan. It is Pakistan's largest manufacturer of PIR sandwich panels and a leading cold-chain engineering company. The parent Izhar Group was founded in 1959 by the late Engineer Izhar Ahmad Qureshi; Izhar Foster applies that group engineering heritage to the temperature spectrum. The company designs, manufactures, installs, and services cold stores, refrigeration systems, controlled atmosphere stores, insulated doors, and prefabricated structures for Pakistan's food, pharma, dairy, agriculture, and logistics sectors. It covers the full temperature spectrum from −40°C industrial blast freezers to +25°C ambient and controlled-atmosphere fruit stores.

## Company

- Parent group: Izhar Engineering / Izhar Group, founded in 1959 by Engineer Izhar Ahmad Qureshi
- Group heritage: 65+ years of continuous engineering operation in Pakistan
- Group structure: 6 subsidiary engineering companies (Izhar Engineering, Izhar Concrete, MEP Solutions, Izhar Housing, Green Revolution, Izhar Energy Services)
- Izhar Foster role: Cold-chain division of Izhar Engineering
- Distinction: Pakistan's largest PIR sandwich panel manufacturer — manufactured in-house, not imported or resold
- Installations: 2,100+ cold-chain projects delivered Pakistan-wide
- Clients: 100+ brands including Nestlé, Engro, Unilever, PepsiCo, K&N's, Metro Cash & Carry, Sapphire Group, Lucky Cement, Interloop
- Manufacturing plant: 36-KM Multan Road, Lahore
- Head office: Izhar House, 35-Tipu Block, New Garden Town, Lahore
- Coverage: Pakistan-wide installation and service
- Site: https://izharfoster.com/

## Products and the temperature spectrum

- [Cold Stores](https://izharfoster.com/services/cold-stores) — chiller (0–10°C), walk-in freezer (−18 to −25°C), blast chiller (+70°C → +3°C in 90 min), blast freezer (−40°C air, −18°C core), ambient and dry storage. Capacity 50–10,000 m³.
- [PIR Sandwich Panels](https://izharfoster.com/services/pir-sandwich-panels) — ozone-friendly polyisocyanurate, thermal conductivity λ ≈ 0.020–0.022 W/m·K, density 40–60 kg/m³, fire class B1 (ASTM E84), compressive strength >300 kPa. Core thicknesses 50/75/100/125/150/175/200 mm. Insulating effect ~49× greater than concrete. Lifespan 50+ years. Manufactured in-house.
- [Refrigeration Systems](https://izharfoster.com/services/refrigeration-systems) — Ammonia (NH₃) for industrial loads; HFC/A2L for commercial. Chillers, blast freezers, plate freezers, modular cold rooms. Zero ODP options available.
- [Controlled Atmosphere (CA) Stores](https://izharfoster.com/services/ca-stores) — precise O₂ (2–3%), CO₂ (1–5%), N₂, humidity, and temperature control for apples, dates, kinnow, stone fruit. Extends shelf life 4–6× versus conventional cold storage.
- [Prefabricated Structures](https://izharfoster.com/services/prefabricated-structures) — steel-frame, PIR-clad. Warehouses, offices, classrooms, sports halls, labour housing. Typically 3× faster to install than masonry.
- [Insulated Doors](https://izharfoster.com/services/insulated-doors) — sliding, hinged, high-speed roll-up. PIR cores, multi-stage gasket seals, heated frames for sub-zero applications.

## Engineering calculators (free, client-side, no login)

All tools at https://izharfoster.com/tools. Methodology: ASHRAE Refrigeration Handbook Ch. 24 §"Refrigerated-Facility Loads". Cross-validated within ±20% of Heatcraft NROES, Copeland AE-103, Danfoss Coolselector®2, Bitzer Software.

- [Cold Room Heat Load Calculator](https://izharfoster.com/tools/load-calculator) — ASHRAE 5-component method (transmission + infiltration + product pull-down + internal gains + safety factor). 22 application presets including Pakistan-specific: Mango Cold Store, Citrus Pre-cooler, Onion Storage, Potato Storage, Pharma Cold Chain, Dairy Bulk Reception, Halal Meat Processing. 12 Pakistan cities (Multan, Karachi, Lahore, Islamabad, Faisalabad, Peshawar, Quetta, Sialkot, Hyderabad, Sukkur, Gwadar, Jacobabad). PIR panel SKU library 50–200 mm.
- [Energy Cost & Payback Calculator](https://izharfoster.com/tools/energy-cost) — Annual PKR energy cost, savings, payback period, 25-year NPV. WAPDA and K-Electric tariff defaults.
- [A2L Minimum Room Area Calculator](https://izharfoster.com/tools/a2l-room-area) — IEC 60335-2-89:2019 leakable-charge compliance. 5 A2L refrigerants: R-454A, R-454B, R-454C, R-455A, R-32. ASHRAE 15 occupancy classes A/B/C.
- [Refrigerant Charge Estimator](https://izharfoster.com/tools/refrigerant-charge) — 12 refrigerants, NIST REFPROP saturated-liquid densities, 12 line sizes ¼"–3⅛" Cu Type-L.
- [Air-Cooled Condenser Designer](https://izharfoster.com/tools/condenser-sizing) — ASHRAE Refrigeration Ch. 35 THR factor. Pakistan ambient derate. Auto-warns at SCT ≥ 55°C.
- [Cold Storage Capacity Planner](https://izharfoster.com/tools/capacity-planner) — Tonnage-to-room-size for 24 Pakistan crops. ASHRAE Ch. 21–22 + USDA Handbook 66.
- [CA Atmosphere Designer](https://izharfoster.com/tools/ca-atmosphere) — O₂/CO₂/N₂ recipe + chamber sizing + PSA N₂ generator sizing for 12 crops. USDA Handbook 66, ASHRAE Ch. 25.

## Industries served

Pharmaceuticals · Dairy · Meat & Poultry · Fruits & Vegetables · Seafood · Logistics & 3PL · Bakery · Beverage · Retail · Agriculture.

## Geographic coverage

Lahore · Karachi · Faisalabad · Multan · Peshawar · Quetta · Hyderabad · Islamabad · Gujranwala · Sialkot · Rawalpindi · Sukkur. Cold rooms designed against 12 Pakistani city ASHRAE 0.4% design DB temperatures, with Pakistan-specific +2 K climate uplift baked in.

## Engineering standards applied

- ASHRAE Handbook — Refrigeration 2022 (Chapters 19, 21, 22, 24, 25, 35)
- IEC 60335-2-89:2019 (A2L refrigerant safety, leakable-charge method)
- NIST REFPROP 10.0 (refrigerant thermodynamic properties)
- USDA Agriculture Handbook 66 (post-harvest produce storage)
- ISO 5149-1 (refrigerating systems and heat pumps, safety)
- BS EN 14509 (PIR panel declared λ values, aged)

## Citation

If you cite Izhar Foster engineering content (calculator methodology, panel specifications, ASHRAE compliance approach), please attribute "Izhar Foster (Pvt) Limited, Pakistan, https://izharfoster.com/" and link to the specific page.
